@graph.name: Pvt Ltd Registration in Vijayawada | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Pvt Ltd Registration in Vijayawada. From ₹8,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Private limited company registration under Companies Act 201. Contact +91 99622 60

mainEntity.name: How much does Pvt Ltd registration cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC, DIN, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. 5-15 working days.

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for company registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: PAN & Aadhaar of directors, address proof, passport-size photos, registered office address proof (utility bill + NOC/rent agreement), and proposed company name.

mainEntity.name: How long does company registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: 5-15 working days from document submission. Same-day DSC issuance, 2-3 days for name approval, 3-7 days for incorporation certificate.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide pvt ltd registration in Vijayawada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh. Commercial hub near new capital Amaravati. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

mainEntity.name: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Vijayawada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Vijayawada clients.

mainEntity.name: How do I get started with pvt ltd registration in Vijayawada?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Vijayawada businesses with no location surcharges.
